title: Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:SWG-TheTotalExperience.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Galaxies:
The Total Experience'' |developer=[[Sony]] Online Entertainment |publisher=[[LucasArts]] |release date=[[June 1]], [[2005]][[Star Wars Galaxies Memory Book|''Star Wars Galaxies'' Memory Book]] |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=[[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] |modes=Multiplayer |ratings= |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Microsoft Windows|Microsoft Windows]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline= |prev= |next= }} '''''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience''''' is a compilation release of the massively-multiplayer online role-playing video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. It was released to coincide with the Combat Upgrade and the release of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. It was released on [[May 24]]th, [[2005]]. It includes the base game, ''An Empire Divided'', along with the first two expansions, [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] and [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']]. Players who bought the compilation were also rewarded with a [[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeder]], as seen in ''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'', as a usable in-game vehicle. ==Sources== *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=SWG%20Total%20Experience|text=Star Wars Galaxies™: The Total Experience...Coming Soon!}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=65691&month=052005|text=Ship Storage Bonus With Purchase of "SWG: The Total Experience"}} *{{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news20050526.html|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: The Total Experience -- In Stores Now}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GalaxiesNav}} [[Category:Star Wars Galaxies expansion packs]]
